title: StopFleetActionsInput
description: StopFleetActionsInput schema from Amazon GameLift API

allOf.description: A unique identifier for the fleet to stop actions on. You can use either the fleet ID or ARN value.
List of actions to suspend on the fleet.
The fleet location to stop fleet actions for. Specify a location in the form of an Amazon Web Services Region code, such as us-west-2.
